'''Clawmouse''' was a species of rodent found in the [[Desert/Legends|deserts]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dreighton]].

Within the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Old Jedi Order]], there was a [[Clan (Jedi)/Legends|clan]] for [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiates]] named the [[Clawmouse Clan]].

{{Creature-stub}}

*''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault II: The Hidden Empire]]'' {{1stm}}
